data.name: Juicy Cream Pie ™
data.detailed_description:
A visual novel where your last job as an internet detective - digging up dirt for a girl - bring you a gift (or curse?): seeing girls in their animal forms.
Sometimes, it happens in your most intimate moments, blurring the lines between love and instinct.

🖤 Your choices shape the story—embrace your wild side or fight to stay human.

But then, you meet a girl with no animal form at all…

🔥 Fully Animated NSFW Scenes – Juicy 3D encounters, whether human or furry.

💦 Fluid Animations & Voiced Scenes – Every movement, every moan—brought to life.

🔀 Several Endings – Your choices determine who you become and who you love.

Wishlist Now! By smacking that WISHLIST button, you're casting a mega-mojo spell on our dev team, boosting their motivation by +1000 to whip up more juicy scenes and fluffy adventures just for you!

Follow us on Twitter (yeah, Twitter, we just need to be sure you're old enough to understand where to go) for all the juicy updates and behind-the-scenes goodies. Your feedback there helps us shape the story into something even more wild and wonderful!

data.short_description: A 3D visual novel where you decide: embrace your wild side or stay fully human, affecting the girls around you. 🔞 NSFW WARNING: Packed with explicit, juicy mature scenes for a story-first experience.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 簡體中文, 日文, 俄文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
